Header files for NimBLE port to Pebble OS, defining structures, logging, and hardware interrupt functions.


## Files
- **[nimble_npl_os.h](nimble_npl_os.h.md)**: Header file for NimBLE port to Pebble OS, defining event, mutex, semaphore, and callout structures.
- **[nimble_npl_os_log.h](nimble_npl_os_log.h.md)**: Defines log level mappings and logging implementation for NimBLE in PebbleOS.
- **[npl_pebble.h](npl_pebble.h.md)**: Header file for event queue, mutex, semaphore, callout, and hardware interrupt functions in Pebble firmware.
